description_long: This is a small, vintage-style perfume bottle with a rounded, squat body made of dark, slightly glossy glass. The bottle features a wide neck and is sealed with a thick, cylindrical cork stopper that has a natural, textured appearance. Around the midsection of the bottle is a cream-colored paper label, slightly wrinkled and aged, with handwritten, cursive text in dark ink. The glass surface shows subtle wear and patina, suggesting age or frequent handling. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, with no visible branding or ornate embellishments. The bottle's silhouette is symmetrical, with a broad base tapering gently to the neck.
description: A small, dark glass perfume bottle with a cork stopper and a handwritten paper label wrapped around its middle. The design is vintage and utilitarian, with visible wear and no ornate decorations.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cream-colored label with partially legible handwritten text and the cork stopper clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the bottle's rounded body and the edge of the label, with the cork stopper's texture visible.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the plain, unadorned glass surface with no label or text, emphasizing the bottle's shape.
description_view_3: This angled view shows the other edge of the label and more of the bottle's curvature, with the cork stopper still prominent.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is a thick, cylindrical cork with a natural, porous texture and a light brown color. It is removable and fits snugly into the bottle's neck, serving as a functional seal rather than a decorative element.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The silhouette is rounded and squat, with a broad, circular base that gently tapers to a narrower neck and a flat-topped cork. The overall outline is symmetrical and reminiscent of a classic apothecary jar.
